metadata.title:
.RANKEST BRAND


Of ANARCHY

| W. CT. U. so DEsIGNATEs RE-
CENT PETITION ASKING THE


MAYOR TO DROP LID ON SUM-
DAY CLOSING LAW.

pages.raw_text:
Spokane is in the control Of an
archists and these anarchists COM
prise most Of the leading bankers
and business men, according to the
view taken by the Women's Chris
tan Temperance Union of the pre-
sentation Of petition several days
ago asking that the Sunday closing
law be not enforced. The follow
ing resolution has been adopted by
the temperance union workers Of
this city,.


The Spokane federation of the
w. C. T. u, representing 1926 900
women of the nation loyal unto
death to our government, and for
ever opposed to the saloon, the de-
stroyer of our homes, do hereby ex-
press our sorrow and regret, and
urge that list of the names ap-
pearing in The Spokesman-Review
Dec. "a be kept by members for fu-
ture reference.


Resolved, that the petition head
ed, Urge mayor to balk Sunday
law published Tuesday morning,
Dec. "a, is the rankest kind of an
archy;


THAT if the names attached to
this petition represent the largest
business interests of our city, it is
time the $4,000 inhabitants of Spo-
kane declare for law and order and
back up the law enforcement league
in no uncertain manner.


That we will never give up the
fight until our flag waves over the
land of the free and the home of
the brave-freed from the accursed
reign of King Alcohol"
